chapter_title.en: The Chapter of Condolences and Grief During Calamities, Visiting Graves, Lamentation and Mourning Gatherings

text: 503 - وَ رُوِيَ عَنْ هِشَامِ بْنِ اَلْحَكَمِ أَنَّهُ قَالَ: رَأَيْتُ مُوسَى بْنَ جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ يُعَزِّي قَبْلَ اَلدَّفْنِ وَ بَعْدَهُ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.503 - It was narrated from Hisham ibn al-Hakam that He said:
"I saw Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as) offering condolences both before and after the burial."
